title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Exam Practice Room
questions.text: Room 6 is open every lunchtime this week for students who want quiet exam practice. Teachers will not give lessons there, but answer sheets are available for you to check your own work.
questions.question: What is offered in Room 6?

options.C: A place for independent exam practice.
options.A: Extra lunchtime lessons with teachers present.
options.B: Answers that students cannot check themselves.

questions.explanation: Students can practise quietly and check their own answers.

questions.heading: Message from Maria to Alex
questions.text: Alex, I’ve just noticed the invitation says the party starts at seven, not six. I’m glad I checked before leaving! Shall we meet at the bus stop an hour later than we planned?
questions.question: Why is Maria texting Alex?

options.A: To change their meeting time later.
options.B: To say she cannot go to the party.
options.C: To ask where the invitation is.

questions.explanation: Maria realises the party starts later and suggests meeting later.

questions.heading: Language Exchange Café
questions.text: Practise English or French with local students every Thursday evening. You do not need to speak perfectly, but you should be ready to talk in pairs. Drinks are cheaper for participants.
questions.question: Who is the café event for?

options.B: People willing to practise speaking with others.
options.A: People who only want private language lessons.
options.C: People who already speak languages perfectly.

questions.explanation: Participants should be ready to talk in pairs.

questions.heading: From: Tania / Subject: Science club
questions.text: The rocket experiment worked well, but we used nearly all the materials. Before next week’s meeting, could you ask Mr White whether we can have more card and tape?
questions.question: What does Tania want?

options.C: Someone to request extra materials for them.
options.A: Someone to repeat the experiment alone.
options.B: Mr White to cancel science club.

questions.explanation: Tania asks the reader to request more card and tape.

questions.heading: Museum Audio Guide
questions.text: Audio guides are free with your ticket. Choose the children’s version if you prefer shorter explanations. Please return the guide to the desk before visiting the café or gift shop.
questions.question: What should visitors do?

options.A: Give back the guide before leaving the exhibitions.
options.B: Pay extra for the children’s audio guide.
options.C: Keep the guide while visiting the café.

questions.explanation: Visitors should return the guide before going to the café or gift shop.
